acceptance_tests: All reliability flags true for recommended schedule; no penalties applied.
Max deliverable_export_mw <= 105 in all hours with interconnection_abs_mw <= 1e-6.
Objective reconciliation error <= 0.01 USD for both cases.
Max |P_base| <= 80 MW across all adjacent hours with ramp_abs_mw <= 1e-6.
Post-contingency SOC >= 120 MWh in all hours; terminal SOC within 220-300 MWh.

planned_changes: Deliver a runnable standard-library notebook or .py script that formulates and solves both reliable and naive cases; print all variables, constraints, and objective components.

Export dispatch_schedule.csv with per-hour columns: interval, charge_mw, discharge_mw, regulation_mw, reserve_mw, fr_required_mw, deliverable_export_mw, soc_start_mwh, soc_end_mwh, throughput_mwh, post_contingency_soc_mwh, ramp_base_mw, and boolean flags (interconnection_ok, fr_ok, reserve_ok, pcsoc_ok, ramp_ok, soc_bounds_ok, throughput_ok, terminal_soc_ok).
Fix deliverability: enforce discharge_mw + regulation_mw + reserve_mw + fr_required_mw <= 105 when FR is required; otherwise omit fr_required_mw. Re-optimize schedules accordingly.
Define and enforce ramp on base net energy dispatch P_base = discharge_mw - charge_mw with |P_base| <= 80 MW; compute and report ramp_ok flags.
Compute post-contingency SOC as soc_start - (discharge_mw + reserve_mw)/0.92 and enforce >= 120 MWh; add pcsoc_ok flag.

Provide per-hour objective breakdown in both CSV and memo: energy_revenue, regulation_revenue, reserve_revenue, charge_cost, degradation_cost (18 USD/MWh throughput), outage_risk_cost, reliability_penalty, net_hourly. Sum to totals and reconcile to within 0.01 USD.
Add assertions/tests for SOC balance, exclusivity (no simultaneous charge and discharge), bounds, throughput, FR/reserve triggers, interconnection with FR, and ramp; document numeric tolerances.

Update the memo: replace schedules and checks with CSV-backed results; include stacked plots (deliverable export vs. 105 MW, SOC trajectory) and a short sensitivity on regulation price and SCR-triggered reserve; clearly state zero penalties for the recommended stack.
Document environment and determinism (Python version, seeds); include a single command to run the study end-to-end.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Only the memo artifact was delivered; the runnable notebook and CSV outputs are missing, preventing verification and reproducibility. Ramping explanations conflict with the tabulated values. Per-hour objective decomposition and reconciliation to the stated totals are not provided.
